narrative:
26 Ohio Senate district has 224,553 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.1 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -8.8% D−R vs -26.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
